verses.text: Nang sangin a uzaw mite taiibawl kei in la, na pa bangin ngaihsunin hanthawn in. Nang sangin a nauzawte na nau bangin bawl in
Nang sangin a uzaw numeite na nu bangin bawl in la, nang sangin a nauzaw numeite, lungsim siangtho tak tawh na nau numei bangin bawl in
Meigong taktak ahi numeite zahtakbawl in

Meigong numei khatpeuh in tate ahi a, tute ahi zongin a neih leh innkuan sungah biakna tawh kisai-in tavuan a neihna uh hilh in la, a nu a pa, a pu a pite a huhna dingun gen in. Hih bang gamtatna pen Pasian' muhna-ah a hoih thu ahi hi
A kem a khoi ding a omlo meigong taktak ahi numeite in Pasian bek mah muan' leh suan'in nei-in, a sun a zanin Pasian' huhding deihin thu ngen tawntung uh hi
Ahi zongin a pumpi uh deihna zui-in a gamta meigong numeite pen a pumpi uh a nuntak hangin kha thu-ah a sikhin ahi uh hi
Amaute paubaan'na a omlohna dingin hih ka hong thupiaksate amaute tungah gensawn in
Mi khatpeuh in a beh a phung, a diakdiakin a innkuansung mite a vak nop kei leh a upna a nusia hita a, thu umlo mite sangin siazaw lai hi
Meigong numei khat peuhpeuh a khan' kum sawmguk a cingsate, leh pasal khatvei bek a nei ngeite bek, meigong sazian sungah koih in

Tua banah a gamtat hoihna a kitheite, a tate hoihtakin a khan'suahsate, a inn-ah zin leh leengla do a siam mite, kiniamkhiatin Pasian' mite' khe a silsakte, a lungkham mite a huhte, leh thu khempeuhah a hoih gamtat mite hi lai ding uh hi
A khangno lai meigong numeite, sazian sungah hel kei in. A pumpi uh deihna zui-in pasal a neihkik nop uh ciangin Khrih taisan uh ahih manin
a thuciam masak uh palsat uh ahih manin a mawh a suak uh hi

Tua bek zong hiloin, bangmah semloin inn khat pan inn khatah vak kawikawi-in a hun uh mawk beisak uh a, a vakmawk uh tawh maisak loin mi gensia kawikawi-in midangte va nawngkaisak uh a, a genlohpi ding teng uh genin va nei uh hi
Tua ahih manin a khangno lai meigong numeite in pasal nei-in, ta nei-in, amau innkuansung ukin, i langte' hong gensiatna ding a omlohna ding ka deihzaw hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh meigong numei pawlkhat, Satan' nung a zui dingin kipan khinta uh hi
Thu um innkuansungah meigong numei a nei a om leh pawlpite in a kisam meigong taktakte a huhtheihna dingin pawlpi tungah tavuan hong guan' kei hen la, amau' meigong numeite na huh ta uh hen
Pawlpi sungah ukna leh makaihna siamin, thuhilh leh thugen hahkat tawh a thuah upate pen thaman a zah nih piakdingin kilawm hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho in, “Buh a cil bawngtal muk na tuam kei in,” a cih banah, “Nasempa in a thaman a ngahding a kilawm ahi hi,” na ci hi
Upa khat peuhpeuh a mawhsak mi nih leh thum a om kei buang leh thu-in na sim kei in
A khial takpi upa a om leh upa dangte a lautheihna dingin a lawmte mai-ah tua a khialpa taii-in thuhilh in
Hih ka hong gen thute na zatna-ah kuamah guptuam paihtuam nei hetloin hoihtakin hong mangin na zatna dingin Pasian, Khrih Jesuh, leh a siangtho vantung mite' muhna-ah limtakin a hong gen ka hi hi
Topa' na a sem dingin kipsakna-in khut nga-in thungetna pen kuama tungah zang mengmeng kei in. Midang a khialte tawh khialkhawm kha kei in la, siangtho takin na omtheihna dingin limtakin kikem in
Na gilsung natna leh na nat mun zelzelna hangin tui bek zang nawnloin leenggahzu tawmtawm na zang in
Mi pawlkhatte' khialhnate kimu pahpahin mawhsakna thuakpah uh a, pawlkhatte' khialhna pen damdamin hong kinung theih hi
Tua mah bangin gamtat hoihnate zong kilangin, kimu-in, a kithei pah kei zongin ki-imcip suak theilo hi.
